title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client library for Ollama; chat, embed, pull, and manage models from Python.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node and browsers; chat, stream, and pull models.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package to use Ollama models as LLM or embeddings in LangChain apps.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (ChatGPT-style interface) with model management, chat history, and multi-user support.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama; stream, chat, and pull models from JVM languages.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: Experimental GitHub Copilot-like VS-Code extension powered by Ollama models.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Minimal interactive REPL wrapper around Ollama with readline and prompt toolkit.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration to use Ollama models as generators or embedders in Haystack pipelines.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Simple RAG example using Ollama for local embeddings and generation with Chroma vector store.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Discord bot that lets servers chat with Ollama models using slash commands.

title: ollama-npm
summary: Official npm package providing JavaScript/TypeScript bindings for Ollama.

title: ollama-pypi
summary: Official PyPI package for Python integration with Ollama.

title: ollama-streamlit
summary: Streamlit chat app template that connects to local Ollama instance with session memory.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU and PVC support.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Community Rust crate providing async bindings to Ollama’s REST API.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module to run Ollama containers in CI pipelines for testing LLM-powered apps.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Slack bolt app that adds /ollama slash command to query local models from Slack.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin to run local LLM prompts inside notes via Ollama.

title: ollama-rag-chatbot
summary: End-to-end RAG chatbot template using Ollama, LangChain, and Streamlit with PDF upload.
